findings.description: Incorrect table structure with duplicated content in the vendor information section.
findings.evidence: On page 1, the PDF contains a complex form layout for vendor details. The HTML attempts to render this as a 3-column table, which forces incorrect grouping and duplicates several fields across columns (e.g., 'FEDERAL ID OR SOCIAL SECURITY NO.', 'Where will services be performed:', and 'FAX NUMBER' appear multiple times in the HTML table).
